governance.primary-objective: Resolve $FORMAT at runtime to drive the HarfBuzz SVG generation pipeline. Maintain traceability between the two MIME registries for governance, gap analysis, and cost-benefit review of format coverage.

code-set.name: Singine Route Class
code-set.description: Three-way classification of MIME types in singine for routing content to the correct processing backend. Determines HarfBuzz shaping eligibility.

code-value.description: Full-text indexable content. Routed to Lucene index. TextFormat family. HarfBuzz SVG shaping is eligible for this class.
RDF/graph content. Routed to triple store and SPARQL endpoint. SemanticFormat family. Not eligible for HarfBuzz shaping.
Opaque binary. Pass-through only. No text extraction. BinaryFormat family. Not eligible for HarfBuzz shaping (except image/svg+xml which is the HarfBuzz output target).
Unrecognised MIME type. Not routable.

code-set.name: Silkpage Handler Class
code-set.description: Dispatch handler categories used in silkpage's MIME dispatch table. Each value names the interpreter command used to execute or serve the format.

code-value.description: Static file served without transformation.
XML served statically or transformed via XSLT.
XSLT stylesheet executed by xsltproc.
POSIX shell script executed by sh.
Bash shell script executed by bash.
Python 3 script executed by python3.
JavaScript executed by Node.js.
Dispatched by Node.js or Python 3 depending on context.
Racket language source executed by racket.
Ruby script executed by ruby.
Perl script executed by perl.
AWK program executed by awk.
Singine DSL command file executed by the singine CLI.
No silkpage handler registered. Coverage gap; extend mime-types.sng.

code-set.name: MIME Format Hierarchy
code-set.description: Hierarchical classification of MIME types by format family. Drives route decisions, HarfBuzz eligibility, and gap analysis. Parent-child relations use skos:broader (SKOS) / collibra:broader. Transferable to any metadata-aware system supporting concept hierarchies.

code-value.description: Top-level media format classification. Root of the hierarchy.
Human-readable text. Maps to singine route :lookup. HarfBuzz SVG shaping eligible.
Machine-readable structured text: JSON, XML, YAML, TOML, XSLT, JavaScript.
code-value.mime-members: application/json application/xml application/yaml application/toml application/xslt+xml application/javascript

code-value.description: Unstructured or lightly-structured text: plain, CSV, TSV.
Text with presentation markup: HTML, Markdown, CSS.
Syndication feed formats: Atom, RSS.
Singine vendor XML text formats: sindoc, skh.
RDF/graph content. Maps to singine route :link. Not eligible for HarfBuzz.
Standard RDF serialisations: Turtle, N-Triples, N-Quads, TriG, N3, JSON-LD.
code-value.mime-members: text/turtle text/n3 application/n-triples application/n-quads application/trig application/ld+json

code-value.description: OWL ontology formats: RDF/XML, OWL/XML.
SPARQL query and result formats.
Singine URFM vendor semantic format.
Opaque binary. Maps to singine route :binary. Pass-through; no text extraction.
Raster and vector images. image/svg+xml is the HarfBuzz output format.
code-value.note: image/svg+xml is :binary in singine (it is an image) but is the output target of the HarfBuzz pipeline.

code-value.description: Compressed archive formats.
Office and PDF document formats.
Columnar and big-data serialisation formats.
Audio and video stream formats.

code-set.name: Crosswalk Equivalence Type
code-set.description: Equivalence classification for each entry in the singine↔silkpage MIME crosswalk. Aligned with SKOS mapping relations (skos:exactMatch, skos:closeMatch). Gap and reverse are first-class records, not omissions.

code-value.description: Source and target MIME types are identical. Same IANA type, same semantics. skos:exactMatch.
Same format, different MIME type variant (e.g. text/xml vs application/xml). skos:closeMatch.
Different MIME type designating the same underlying format. Non-standard alt MIME. skos:closeMatch.
Present in singine only; no silkpage handler. Coverage gap. Extend mime-types.sng to close.
Present in silkpage only; not in singine canonical extension table. Singine registration needed to close.

mapping-specification.name: Singine ↔ Silkpage MIME Registry Mapping Specification
mapping-specification.description: Field-level mapping between the singine canonical MIME registry and the silkpage MIME dispatch table. Establishes the source-target field correspondence used to resolve $FORMAT for the HarfBuzz SVG pipeline.

field-mapping.note: Lowercase extension without leading dot. Singine is the canonical authority for extension-to-MIME assignment. Silkpage uses the same convention.
IANA MIME type string. This is the join key for the crosswalk. Exact string match for equivalence=exact; crosswalk entry resolves for equivalence=close or alias.

field-mapping.derivation-rule: Derivation is through the crosswalk, not a 1:1 copy. :lookup + crosswalk-match → specific handler (static, xsltproc, node, python3, sh, bash, …) :lookup + crosswalk-gap → (none) — no silkpage coverage :binary → (static) for image/svg+xml; (none) for all others :link → (none) — semantic formats have no silkpage dispatch handler
field-mapping.note: Route is a singine internal routing concept. Handler is a silkpage dispatch concept. The mapping traverses the crosswalk at runtime.
Human-readable description exists only in silkpage. No singine source equivalent. Not populated during $FORMAT resolution.

crosswalk.name: MIME Dispatch Crosswalk — singine ↔ silkpage
crosswalk.description: Maps each MIME type from the singine registry to its silkpage dispatch handler. Equivalence types use XwalkEquivalenceType codes (SKOS-aligned). Gap and reverse entries are first-class records exposing coverage mismatches.

coverage-summary.exact: text/html, application/xml, application/xslt+xml, application/json, application/javascript, image/svg+xml, text/css
coverage-summary.gap: PlainText (3), MarkupText/SyndText/VendorText gaps (6), all SemanticFormat (11), most BinaryFormat (17). These require extending silkpage/mime-types.sng to close.
coverage-summary.reverse: Executor MIMEs in silkpage (sh, bash, racket, python3, ruby, perl, awk, singine) and their alt-MIME aliases. Not registered in singine canonical extension table. Register in singine/lang/mime.clj to close.

gap-remediation.strategy: To close a gap: add the MIME type and a handler to silkpage/mime-types.sng. To close a reverse: register the MIME type in singine/core/src/singine/lang/mime.clj extension->mime and mime-route-table with the appropriate route keyword.
gap-remediation.priority: High: PlainText, MarkupText gaps — these are HarfBuzz-eligible formats with no handler. Medium: VendorText, SyndText — singine-native formats with no silkpage dispatch. Low: SemanticFormat gaps — :link route; silkpage does not serve a triple store. Defer: BinaryFormat gaps — :binary; no text extraction needed.

pipeline.name: HarfBuzz SVG Generation Pipeline
pipeline.description:
Generates SVG from a source file in format $FORMAT. $FORMAT is a file extension or MIME type string resolved through the singine→silkpage MIME crosswalk at runtime.
Only TextFormat family formats with a registered silkpage handler are eligible. SemanticFormat (:link) and BinaryFormat (:binary) formats are not eligible for shaping. Gap formats (:lookup but handler=(none)) require mime-types.sng extension before use.

step.name: Extension → MIME
step.input: $FORMAT (file extension without dot, e.g. "md", or full path)

step.name: MIME → Route (singine classification)
step.gate: Must be :lookup for the pipeline to proceed. :link and :binary terminate the pipeline with "not applicable".

step.name: MIME → Handler (crosswalk dispatch)
step.fallback: If equivalence=gap: handler=(none). Pipeline terminates with "gap — extend mime-types.sng".

step.name: Text Extraction
step.note: For (static) and (static/xslt) handlers, the file content itself is the text stream. For executor handlers (python3, node, etc.) the script is run and its stdout is shaped.

step.name: HarfBuzz Text Shaping
step.output: SVG glyph paths with advance widths and positions
step.note: HarfBuzz processes the Unicode text stream with the specified font and script. hb-view renders shaped glyphs directly to SVG using font outline data. Font and script selection is caller-supplied; this pipeline does not prescribe them.

step.name: SVG Output
step.note: The produced SVG is an ImageFormat asset in both systems. singine routes it :binary (pass-through); silkpage serves it as (static). This completes the pipeline: TextFormat input → ImageFormat output.

eligible-formats.note: TextFormat family with a registered silkpage handler (non-gap entries). These formats can be fed to HarfBuzz without extending mime-types.sng.

gap-formats.note: TextFormat family (:lookup) but no silkpage handler (gap crosswalk entries). Extend silkpage/dev/singine/data/reference/mime-types.sng to enable.
